summary: NAS100 pullback from ATH (30,776) continues into Day 3 — price at 30,154 after sweeping SSL at 30,018 on H4. D1 structure remains BULLISH (HH/HL) but price is deep in daily premium (140.5% of stale DR 28,596→29,705). Provisional DR (28,596→30,776) puts price at 71.4% — still premium. H4 is in DISCOUNT (24.7% of 30,018→30,569), which is where longs should be sought in a bullish trend. M15 shows no Kill Zone active (between sessions), bearish OB at 30,078-30,110, bullish OBs at 30,085-30,148. The 30,000 level is critical — if held, this pullback is a healthy discount accumulation; if broken with displacement, targets 29,848→29,676. Bias: NEUTRAL-BEARISH short-term (pullback active), but macro trend remains BULLISH.

ict_analysis.daily_bias: D1 structure BULLISH (HH/HL from 28,596→30,776 swing) but price at 140.5% of old DR (28,596→29,705) — STALE, ignore. Provisional DR 28,596→30,776: price at 71.4% = PREMIUM. Last 5 D1: 3 bullish (May 28, 31, Jun 1) then 2 bearish (Jun 2 -0.8%, Jun 3 -0.77%) showing corrective pullback from ATH. Jun 3 closed at 30,229.7 near the low (50% body) — bearish conviction. No D1 MSS confirmed yet — price above all major MAs. Macro trend intact, but pullback seeking deeper SSL at 30,000.
ict_analysis.h4_context: H4 dealing range 30,018.6→30,569.6, equilibrium 30,294.1. Price at 30,154 = 24.7% → DISCOUNT (correct zone for longs in bullish trend). Bearish FVG at 30,213.9→30,364.8 (150pt gap) — overhead resistance. Bullish FVGs at 30,315→30,365 and 30,552→30,566 above. H4 swing low at 30,018.6 (Jun 5 01:00 UTC) was swept — watch for SSL sweep reversal or continuation below 30,000. Last 6 H4 candles: 4 bearish, 2 weak bullish — corrective momentum persists.
ict_analysis.m15_status: M15 range 30,029.3→30,223.8, current 30,154.7. Bearish OB at 30,078.9→30,110.4 (06:45 UTC), bullish OBs at 30,085.7→30,128.3 and 30,114.5→30,148.7 (08:00-08:45 UTC). Bearish FVG at 30,162.8→30,178.3. NO Kill Zone active (11:02 UTC — between London close and NY open). NY Open Kill Zone (13:00-16:00 UTC) opens in ~2hrs — this is where entry confirmation should be sought. No valid entry yet — wait for NY session OB formation.

risks.event: 30,000 psychological level — breakdown or bounce zone
SSL sweep at 30,018 — reversal vs continuation risk
Macro bullish vs short-term bearish conflict

recommendation: WAIT — No valid entry yet. Three-layer analysis: (1) D1 bias is BULLISH macro but price in premium — favor longs on pullback, not shorts, (2) H4 context is DISCOUNT (24.7%) which is the CORRECT zone for longs in a bullish trend — but bearish FVG at 30,213→30,365 overhead, (3) M15 has no Kill Zone active and no confirmed OB entry pattern. KEY SCENARIOS for NY Open: (A) Price holds 30,000→30,018, sweeps SSL, forms bullish M15 OB during NY Kill Zone → LONG entry targeting 30,294→30,360 (H4 equilibrium/62%). (B) Price breaks 30,000 with displacement → SHORT targeting 29,848→29,676 (but this conflicts with macro bullish trend — reduced confidence). Wait for NY Open (13:00 UTC) for M15 OB + Kill Zone confirmation before executing.
